originalTitle: Wild celebrations to verge of tears - time running out for Spurs
originalDescription: Scenes of celebration turned to bitter disappointment as Tottenham's hopes of avoiding relegation from the Premier League were dealt a devastating blow against Brighton.

originalTitle: Protests and another costly loss - pressure mounts on Rosenior's Chelsea
originalDescription: Chelsea head coach Liam Rosenior admits his side face a "mountain to climb" as their campaign unravels at a crucial juncture following defeat by Manchester United.

originalTitle: Carrick silences doubters as Man Utd close on Champions League
originalDescription: Manchester United beat Chelsea to move closer to a Champions League return and silence the growing Michael Carrick doubters.

originalTitle: Howe's biggest Newcastle challenge yet as questions grow on his future
originalDescription: Newcastle are languishing in 14th place in the Premier League following defeat by Bournemouth. Will manager Eddie Howe turn it around?

originalTitle: How Hampton's heroics bailed out Lionesses in win against Iceland
originalDescription: Goalkeeper Hannah Hampton says she just "did my job" in pulling off three crucial late saves as England held on to beat Iceland 1-0.

originalTitle: Can Leeds feel safe from relegation after back-to-back wins?
originalDescription: Leeds United are eight points above the Premier League drop zone after back-to-back wins - so can they feel safe from relegation?

originalTitle: Four months on, all change as Celtic & St Mirren meet at Hampden again
originalDescription: St Mirren are hoping for another shock cup win over Celtic, but this time things could be different.

originalTitle: Iraola bowing out in style - where will he go next?
originalDescription: Any suggestion of distraction following Andoni Iraola's decision to leave Bournemouth was firmly dismissed by his players in their statement victory against Newcastle.

originalTitle: Chelsea's CL hopes suffer another bitter blow in Man Utd defeat
originalDescription: Chelsea's hopes of qualifying for next season's Champions League took another huge blow as they suffered a 1-0 defeat at home to Manchester United.

originalTitle: Man Utd secure huge win in race for CL as pressure mounts on Rosenior
originalDescription: FREE TO WATCH: Highlights from Chelsea’s match against Manchester United in the Premier League.

originalTitle: Rosenior admits he doesn't know consequences of no CL football
originalDescription: Chelsea boss Liam Rosenior has admitted he doesn't know what consequences the Blues will face if they fail to qualify for the Champions League.

originalTitle: 'You will be thrown out!' | Darts ref takes on whistlers again!
originalDescription: Darts referee Huw Ware makes his thoughts known about the whistles in the crowd during the European Darts Grand Prix. Video credit: @OfficialPDC

originalTitle: Bromley promoted to League One for first time in their history
originalDescription: Bromley have been promoted to League One for the first time in their history with two games of the season to spare.
